name: Ryzi Me Araka (Rice & Peas)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Hot water or vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium-size heavy saucepan. Saute the onions until they are tender.
2. Add the rice and stir until all grains are well-coated. Incorporate the peas, salt, and pepper (adjust seasoning as needed based on your choice of using vegetable broth). Stir to combine.
3. Pour in the hot water or vegetable broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 25 minutes.
This recipe makes four to six servings.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 150 calories, 5 grams protein, 3 grams fat, 32 grams carbohydrate.
